properties.remark: SPOTTER REPORTS NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZE HAIL. FREEZING RAIN.

DELAYED REPORT. INTERSTATE 280 CLOSED AT MILE MARKER 15 DUE TO WATER OVER THE ROAD. WATER WAS FLOWING...UP TO NINE INCHES DEEP...OVER A 100 FT SECTION OF BOTH THE EASTBOUND AND WESTBOUND LANES. THE ILLINOIS STATE POLICE CLOSED THE INTERSTATE...AND DETOURED TRAFFIC...FROM 830 PM CST ON 2/17/2008 TO 900 AM CST ON 2/18/2008. THE FLOODED ROAD WAS A RESULT OF EXCESSIVE RUNOFF IN MILL CREEK. ONE MOTORIST VENTURED INTO THE FLOODWATERS BUT HDYROPLANED AND LOST CONTROL. NO INJURIES.
SEVERAL ROADS AROUND THE COUNTY DUE TO WATER OVER THE ROADWAYS.

DELAYED REPORT. INTERSTATE 280 CLOSED AT MILE MARKER 15 DUE TO WATER OVER THE ROAD. WATER WAS FLOWING...UP TO THREE FEET DEEP...OVER BOTH THE EASTBOUND AND WESTBOUND LANES. THE ILLINOIS STATE POLICE CLOSED THE INTERSTATE....AND DETOURED TRAFFIC...FROM THE AFTERNOON ON 3/2 TO THIS MORNING. THE FLOODED ROAD WAS THE RESULT OF AN ICE JAM DOWNSTREAM ON MILL CREEK.
